question.label: What's nourishing
question.name: What's been nourishing in your life recently?
question.description: 'Nourishing' invites what is genuinely sustaining — not just pleasant. No work scope.

assessment.note: Answer 'seeing my class finish' indicates a positive, albeit mild, wellbeing signal from completion satisfaction.

new_queue.label: Opening pace check
new_queue.name: How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?

new_queue.label: Friction scan
new_queue.name: What's been slower or harder than it should have been?

new_queue.label: Workshop scheduling issues
new_queue.name: What's been the biggest challenge with planning workshops lately?

new_queue.label: Energy management
new_queue.name: What's draining your energy most in your current workload?

new_queue.label: Team collaboration dynamics
new_queue.name: How is the team working together on planning and preparation?

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What support would make your workshop planning more effective?

new_queue.label: Prioritization clarity
new_queue.name: How clear are you on your top priorities for the next month?

new_queue.label: Next steps commitment
new_queue.name: What's the first concrete thing you want to have moved by our next conversation?
